roa.docketEntryComment: PUB DEF ADD TO CALENDAR RE MOTION TO ISSUE WARRANT FILED
DEFT'S ADD TO CAL FOR MOT TO TRANSPORT DEF ON EARLIER DATE FILED

/CAL: PAROLE'S PETITION TO REVOKE OR MODIFY PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC3000,08 DISMISSAL/X:PETITION WITHDRAWN AND DISMISSED,/X:PAROLE REINSTATED TO: 2-18-2014 WITHOUT ANY TIME LOSS, /X:IN LIGHT OF THIS DISPOSITION, PAROLEE IS NO LONGER ON PAROLE,/
/CAL:PAROLE-BENCH WARRANT DISCHARGE/DAWT/BWDNC/X:COURT VACATES SENTENCE WHICH WAS ISSUED ON MAY 8, 2014/X:COURT REINSTATES PAROLE REVOCATION PROCEEDINGS/NB/CONTD:DISMISSAL/DOPC/

/CAL:PAROLE'S PETITION TO REVOKE OR MODIFY PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC3000,08/X:THE COURT VACATES THE PREVIOUS SENTENCE OF 05-06-14, AND IMPOSES SENTENCE AS FOLLOWS:/3000REIN/PAJ:100 DAYS /X:PAROLEE SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT FOR  17DAYS,/4019HALF/X:CLIENT MAY SERVE HIS SENTENCE THROUGH A RESIDENTIAL DRUGTREATMENT PROGRAM,  CLIENT MUST COMPLETE 90 DAYS OF ACTUAL TREATMENT AT HEALTHRIGHT360,  HE WILL BE TRANSPORTED TO THE PROGRAM BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,  A BED WILL BE AVAILABLE FOR CLIENT ON THURSDAY, MAY 15, 2014, THISHAS BEEN CONFIRMED BY MICHAEL DAVILA OF HEALTHRIGHT360,  ADULT PAROLE HAS THE DISCRETION TOMODIFY TREATMENT, CHANGE THE TREATMENT PROGRAM, SEND PAROLEE INTO A DETOX FACILITY IN THE EVENT OF A RELAPSE AND IMPLEMENT ANY OTHER THERAPEUTIC MEASURE AS DEEMED APPROPRIATE DURING THE 90 DAYS OF TREATMENT,IF CLIENT FAILS TO COMPLETE HIS 90 DAYS OF ACTUAL TREATMENT WITHOUT A LAWFUL JUSTIFICATION, HE MAY BE SUBJECT TO A NEW PETITION BASED UPON A VIOLATIONOF A COURT ORDER, PAROLE WAS SUSPENDED ON 2-18-2014,PAROLE IS REINSTATED ASOF 4-22-2014,/X:PAROLEE ORDERED TO REPORT TO PAROLE UPON RELEASE AND COMPLY WITH TREATMENT PER PAROLE AGENT,/

/CAL:PAROLE'S PETITION TO REVOKE OR MODIFY PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC3000,08/PDP/WIAPTR/3000ADV/3000ADM/3000REIN/PAJ:100 DAYS /X:PAROLEE SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT FOR  15  DAYS,/4019HALF/X:CLIENT MAY SERVE HIS SENTENCE THROUGH A RESIDENTIAL DRUG TREATMENT PROGRAM,  CLIENT MUST COMPLETE 90 DAYS OF ACTUAL TREATMENT AT HEALTHRIGHT360,  HE WILL BE TRANSPORTED TO THE PROGRAM BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,  A BED WILL BE AVAILABLE FOR CLIENT ON THURSDAY, MAY 29, 2014, THIS HAS BEEN CONFIRMED BY MICHAEL DAVILA OF HEALTHRIGHT360,  ADULT PAROLE HAS THE DISCRETION TOMODIFY TREATMENT, CHANGE THE TREATMENT PROGRAM, SEND PAROLEE INTO A DETOX FACILITY IN THE EVENT OF A RELAPSE AND IMPLEMENT ANY OTHER THERAPEUTIC MEASURE AS DEEMED APPROPRIATE DURING THE 90 DAYS OF TREATMENT,  IF CLIENT FAILS TO COMPLETE HIS 90 DAYS OF ACTUAL TREATMENT WITHOUT A LAWFUL JUSTIFICATION, HE MAY BE SUBJECT TO A NEW PETITION BASED UPON A VIOLATIONOF A COURT ORDER, PAROLE WAS SUSPENDED ON 2-18-2014,PAROLE ISREINSTATED AS OF 4-22-2014,/X:PAROLEE ORDERED TO REPORT TO PAROLE UPON RELEASE AND COMPLY WITH TREATMENT PER PAROLE AGENT,/
/CAL:PAROLE'S PETITION TO REVOKE PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC3000,08/FTA/OREVKD/BWI/NB/BWNUM:1ST/NIGHTSERV/
